description: Create a UML Component Diagram in EdrawMax representing an e-commerce microservices architecture. Model the following six components: API Gateway, User Service, Product Catalog Service, Order Service, Payment Service, and Notification Service. The architecture requires dependency relationships where the API Gateway depends on the User Service, Product Catalog Service, and Order Service, and the Order Service depends on the Payment Service, Product Catalog Service, and Notification Service. Include interface symbols to represent provided APIs and required data access. Add the title 'E-Commerce Microservices Component Diagram' at the top. Save the editable diagram to /home/ga/Documents/ecommerce_component_diagram.eddx and export a PNG image to /home/ga/Documents/ecommerce_component_diagram.png.
